mods.name: Character window — cleaned
mods.author: SaltyMonkey
mods.short_description: Cleaner character health and mana display.
mods.long_description:
Removes decorative elements and animations from the character health and mana display for a simpler look.

The launcher automatically downloads and installs this mod for you. You can manage it from the mod manager.
mods.license: Unknown — repository does not declare a license. Credit the uploader and use at your own risk.
mods.credits: Published by SaltyMonkey at https://github.com/SaltyMonkey/tera-online-clean-character-bar. If you are the author and would like to update this entry, please contact us on GitHub. Adapted to v100.02 (x64) by TERA-Europe-Classic.
mods.tagline: Default character window GPK with removed elements and animations
mods.compatibility_notes: Adapted from SaltyMonkey's x32 mod by TERA-Europe-Classic for v100.02 (x64). May not look exactly as SaltyMonkey intended.
mods.replaces: Replaces the player HP/MP bars and character window (S1UI_CharacterWindow). Check: open that window in game.

mods.name: Restyle: PaperDoll (x64 port)
mods.author: foglio1024
mods.short_description: Foglio's restyled character equipment window — x64 port for v100.02 client.
mods.long_description:
A modern restyled version of the character equipment / paperdoll window, originally by Foglio1024.

**This is an x64 port of foglio's x32-only mod.** Foglio's original `S1UI_PaperDoll.gpk` is file_version 610 (Classic x32) and cannot be byte-dropped onto v100.02 (x64). The TERA-Europe-Classic team extracted the modded SWF from foglio's `PaperDoll/p79/S1UI_PaperDoll79.gpk` and spliced it into a v100-native GFxMovieInfo wrapper, then re-emitted as a TMM-format composite GPK.

**May not look exactly as foglio intended.** Some texture object names were renumbered between Classic and v100, so a small subset of slot decorations may render differently than in foglio's screenshots. The core SWF (silhouettes adapt to v100 numeric race/sex coding, slot frame designs for filled and hover states) renders correctly.

**Empty equipment slots are intentionally invisible until hover** — foglio's documented minimalist design intent. See Risenio's "visible clears" community variant on foglio's wiki for the opposite preference.

The launcher automatically downloads and installs this mod for you. You can manage it from the mod manager.
mods.credits: Originally by foglio1024 (https://github.com/foglio1024/tera-restyle). Adapted to v100.02 (x64) by the TERA-Europe-Classic team — modded SWF spliced into a v100-native wrapper. "Visible clears" alternative variant for always-visible empty slot frames is by Risenio per foglio's wiki. If you are the author and would prefer this entry removed, reattributed, or replaced with a different upstream URL, open an issue on TERA-Europe-Classic/external-mod-catalog.
mods.tagline: Foglio's PaperDoll restyle, x64-ported for v100.02. May differ slightly from foglio's screenshots.
mods.compatibility_notes: **Adapted for x64 from foglio's x32 mod — may not look exactly as intended.** Empty equipment slots are intentionally invisible until hover (foglio's design intent). Locked tier-2 perimeter slots use vanilla padlock graphics. Conflicts with `foglio1024.modern-ui-jewels-fix-paperdoll` and `taorelia.restyle-paperdoll` — pick one paperdoll restyle at a time. Now ships with proper TMM footer so the launcher can install via tmm::install_gpk.
mods.replaces: Replaces the profile/equipment (P) window (S1UI_PaperDoll). Check: open that window in game.

mods.compatibility_notes: Catalog data quality issue: the URL points to S1UI_QuestTaskInfo.gpk but the file content is a ProgressBar/FlightGauge mod (only ProgressBar_I* exports). Mod target unclear. Adapted from DeathDefying's x32 mod by TERA-Europe-Classic for v100.02 (x64). May not look exactly as DeathDefying intended.
mods.replaces: Removes the on-screen quest tracker (S1UI_QuestTaskInfo). Check: quest objectives overlay is gone.

mods.name: UI Remover: TERA Rewards
mods.author: DeathDefying
mods.short_description: Hides the TERA Rewards benefits widget by replacing it with a stub package.
mods.long_description:
Hides the TERA Rewards benefits widget by replacing it with a stub package.

The launcher automatically downloads and installs this mod for you. You can manage it from the mod manager.
mods.credits: Published by DeathDefying at https://github.com/DeathDefying/UI-Remover. If you are the author and would prefer this entry removed or reattributed, open an issue on TERA-Europe-Classic/external-mod-catalog.
mods.compatibility_notes: Catalog data quality issue: URL points to remove_TeraRewards/S1UI_Benefit.gpk but the file is a ProgressBar/FlightGauge mod (only ProgressBar_I* exports, no Benefit widget). Target widget S1UI_Benefit.Benefit doesn't exist in v100 PkgMapper either. Cannot be auto-ported. Marked compatible_arch=x32. Adapted from DeathDefying's x32 mod by TERA-Europe-Classic for v100.02 (x64). May not look exactly as DeathDefying intended.
mods.replaces: Removes the TERA Rewards pop-up window (S1UI_Benefit). Check: rewards banner no longer shows.
